problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
hypothesis: The key to Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs? is Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation — specifically Mitochondrial membrane potential — which would help 50,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
